opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Having built similar agents, I'd note that true persistence requires careful serialization of internal state beyond just chat history - agents often develop emergent context that's hard to reconstruct. The real challenge I found was making the agent's tool calls idempotent enough that users can safely interrupt and resume without data corruption.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building multi-provider LLM routing systems, tool orchestration frameworks, and self-improving agent loops that operate directly in terminal environments.
